prose: The HOMO–LUMO gap of water computed via DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF was determined to be approximately **8.9407 eV**. The calculation was performed in the **gas phase**, assuming charge 0 and singlet multiplicity (multiplicity 1). Geometry file was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz`, used without further optimization at this level of theory. The SCF procedure converged within 7 cycles, and the backend reported no warnings affecting the result (integrity checks passed).
